data.name: 爆乳人妻战士
data.detailed_description:
故事:

我是秋山龍平，本來是個普通到不能再普通的男人。
10年前「否定者」軍隊侵略日本，被一群可愛的「純潔少女 Pure Maiden」擊潰打敗。
我也曾經被純潔少女所拯救。
沒想到10年後的今天，否定者竟然捲土重來！
就在人群將要被尼加軍隊襲擊傷害的時候：


“剛毅的純淨之光，Pure 鑽石！”
“高貴典雅的光芒，Pure 水晶！”
“財富的微笑之光，Pure 翡翠！”
“勇敢的火焰，Pure 寶石！”
“溫柔的愛之光，Pure 寶石！”


突然你的身前又出現了一群身穿水手服的美“少女”！
不對……這是……美少··婦？ ！
還是10年前打敗尼加軍隊的純潔少女！
或者應該叫“純潔人妻”了，畢竟10年過去了，這些30歲的女孩們應該已經都已經是人妻了~
很快“純潔人妻”們輕鬆打敗了忍著的軍隊。
在感謝她們的時候，我偶然發現藍寶石的特徵跟你的鄰居人妻非常像。 。 。
瞬間我的腦海中就閃過了無數種謝爾異常的齷齪想法……

特點:

  • 爆乳人妻戰士們都帶有日文語音
  • 24個與爆乳人妻戰士們走火入魔的成​​人場景
  • 從日文原文翻譯到英文
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質
  • 夠你看上幾小時
  • 角色帶有動態效果
  • 帶有收藏展覽和場景選擇

爆乳人妻戰士是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.short_description: 昔日保衛地球的純潔少女 Pure Maidens 轉眼已成為人妻，今天讓我的雞巴帶領《爆乳人妻戰隊》再次對付邪惡軍團...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c

  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Magical MILFs
data.detailed_description:
10 years ago the Pure Maidens defeated the evil organization Nega-Force! After 10 years of peace, the Nega-Force is back. After a sinister corporate rebranding, they are now known as the "Neo Nega-Force". Now the world is once again in need of the Pure Maidens!

During those peaceful times, the Pure Maidens settled down, got married, and grew up into mature beauties. When they re-emerge to face off against the Neo Nega-Force, they are now full-blown magical MILFs!

That's where our protagonist, Ryohei, comes in! He is a normal citizen, with normal lustful desires about his not-so-normal neighbor Ayumi. During a tussle with the Neo Nega-Force, Ryohei catches Ayumi transform into Pure Sapphire! He uses this to blackmail her into indulging in his dirty fantasies with the Magical MILF!

Will Ryohei be able to achieve the same with the other members of the Pure Maidens?


  • The Pure Maidens are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • 24 magical scenes of corrupting the Pure Maidens
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Magical MILFs is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: 10 years after the defeat of the Nega-Force the Pure Maidens are back, and sexier than ever! These Magical Girls have grown up to become Magical MILFs! They might not be as slender and tight as they used to be, but their busty mature bodies spilling out of their skimpy uniforms are ripe for the picking.
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
